## What spell are you adding or changing?

Name the prompt, stack, or part of the tome this PR touches.

- Prompt / spell:
- Stack:
- New prompt, stack change, copy edit, or bug fix:

## Why does this deserve a place in the codex?

Convince the Council of Mages. Be specific, not mystical.

- What kind of app or workflow does this help a mere mortal build?
- What defaults does it choose on purpose?
- What bad or vague AI behavior does it prevent?
- Why is this better than telling the model "just build it"?

## Show your work

The council prefers field-tested spells over tavern rumors.

- Where did you actually use this prompt?
- What did it produce?
- What did you have to fix after the first cast?
- Link to a repo, gist, screenshot, notes, or paste a short before/after if you can.

## Review notes

Tell reviewers what needs the closest read.

- [ ] The prompt is opinionated enough to be useful.
- [ ] The stack choices are current and defensible.
- [ ] The instructions are clear enough for a coding agent to follow.
- [ ] The prompt avoids fake guarantees, vague hype, and hand-wavy "best practices."
- [ ] Any matching skill/reference docs were updated if this changes the catalog structure.

## Screenshots or rendered proof

If this changes the website UI, add screenshots. If it only changes prompt text, this section can stay empty.
